title: chamaerhodiola gelida
intro: Chamaerhodiola gelida is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Arctic lemming cabbage, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Chamaerhodiola gelida include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Chamaerhodiola gelida is typically prepared for medicinal use in the form of tinctures, capsules, or teas, although its popularity and availability may vary.
